title: Tenant Directory Lookup Service
description:
Build a tenant directory lookup service so Cloudflare Workers can determine whether a tenant is pooled or dedicated and where to route traffic.

## Response Schema

```json
{
  "mode": "pooled|dedicated",
  "home_region": "us1",
  "origin_pool": "pool-name",
  "stytch_org_id": "organization-xxx"
}
```

## Requirements

- Fast lookup via edge cache and/or Cloudflare KV with safe TTL and invalidation strategy
- Secure admin-only update path for modifying directory entries
- Supports both pooled and dedicated tenant modes
acceptance_criteria: Directory returns mode, home_region, origin_pool, and stytch_org_id for any tenant slug
Lookup response time is under 50ms via edge cache or KV
Cache invalidation strategy ensures stale entries are refreshed within defined TTL
Directory updates are restricted to admin-only access
middleware_changes: Tenant directory lookup service with caching layer. Resolves tenant_slug to routing configuration (mode, region, origin pool, Stytch org).
data_model_changes: Tenant directory data structure in Cloudflare KV or equivalent, storing mode/region/origin_pool/stytch_org_id per tenant.
api_changes: Admin-only API for managing tenant directory entries (create, update, delete).
implementation_notes: The tenant directory is a critical path component — every request passes through it. KV provides global edge access with low latency. Invalidation strategy must balance freshness vs. performance.
